▼ EPIC-0001 In Progress Project Setup & Infrastructure Medium 1.1 MVP (v0.1) $3,601 projected
US-0001 Done High As a developer, I want the Next.js project initialized with Tailwind and shadcn/ui, so that I can build UI components rapidly. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0001 Next.js 14 App Router project runs with `npm run dev`
  • ○ AC-0002 Tailwind CSS classes render correctly
  • ○ AC-0003 shadcn/ui Button component renders without errors
US-0002 Done High As a developer, I want Supabase configured with browser and server clients, so that I can query the database from any context. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0004 Browser client connects to Supabase project
  • ○ AC-0005 Server client works in Server Components
  • ○ AC-0006 .env.local.example documents required env vars
US-0003 Done High As a developer, I want the database schema deployed with all tables, RLS policies, and indexes, so that the app has a complete data layer. M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0007 All 9 tables created (tournaments, holes, players, teams, clubs, round_state, shots, scores, sponsors)
  • ○ AC-0008 RLS policies enforce player vs admin separation
  • ○ AC-0009 Realtime enabled on scores table
  • ○ AC-0010 Unique constraints prevent duplicate entries
US-0004 Planned High As a developer, I want the project deployed to Vercel, so that we have a production URL for players to register. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $0.90
  • ○ AC-0011 Production deployment accessible via public URL
  • ○ AC-0012 Supabase env vars configured in Vercel
US-0005 Done High As a developer, I want a Google Maps wrapper component, so that I can display holes and player positions. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0013 Map renders with satellite view centered on pin coordinates
  • ○ AC-0014 Pin marker displays at hole location
  • ○ AC-0015 Player position marker updates on GPS capture
US-0006 Done High As a developer, I want clubs and Granite Ridge hole data seeded, so that the app has course data on first run. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0016 21 clubs seeded across 5 categories
  • ○ AC-0017 18 holes seeded with par values and approximate GPS
  • ○ AC-0018 Tournament record created for CIBC 2026 event
US-0007 Done High As a player, I want consistent FDgolf + AI/Run branding on every screen, so that the app feels professional. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0019 Full header shows "FDgolf | created by AI/Run™" with gradient icon
  • ○ AC-0020 Compact header shows condensed branding + hole info
  • ○ AC-0021 Dark green (#1a472a) consistent across all variants
US-0008 Done High As a developer, I want an offline sync engine that queues all writes to localStorage, so that shots are never lost. M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0022 Writes enqueue to localStorage regardless of connectivity
  • ○ AC-0023 Queue flushes automatically when online
  • ○ AC-0024 Failed writes retry up to 5 times
  • ○ AC-0025 Offline indicator shows pending count
  • ○ AC-0026 Online event triggers immediate flush
▼ EPIC-0002 In Progress Registration & Authentication Medium 1.1 MVP (v0.1) $2,401 projected
US-0009 Done High As a player, I want to create an account with email and password, so that I can register for the tournament. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0027 Email/password form validates input (min 6 chars, matching passwords) → TC-0001 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0028 Supabase Auth account created on submit → TC-0002 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0029 Error displayed for duplicate emails → TC-0003 Not Run
US-0010 Done High As a player, I want to enter my profile information, so that tournament organizers know who I am. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0030 Form captures name, title, company, phone (required) and YOB, gender (optional) → TC-0004 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0031 Player record created in players table linked to auth user
US-0011 Done High As a player, I want to link to my assigned team during registration, so that I can see my teammates. M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0032 Team number input validates against existing teams
  • ○ AC-0033 Teammates displayed after lookup
  • ○ AC-0034 Player's team_id updated on registration complete → TC-0005 Not Run
US-0012 Done High As a player, I want to log in with my email and password, so that I can access the app. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0035 Email/password form authenticates via Supabase → TC-0007 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0036 Successful login redirects to /dashboard → TC-0008 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0037 Error message shown for invalid credentials
US-0013 Done High As a developer, I want auth middleware that protects routes and redirects unauthenticated users, so that player data is secure. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0038 Unauthenticated users redirected to /login → TC-0010 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0039 Authenticated users on /login redirected to /dashboard → TC-0011 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0040 Admin routes check player role before access → TC-0012 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0041 Public /live/[slug] route accessible without auth → TC-0013 Not Run
US-0037 Planned Medium As a player, I want to reset my password via email, so that I can recover access. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $0.90
  • ○ AC-0125 "Forgot password" link on login page
  • ○ AC-0126 Reset email sent via Supabase Auth
  • ○ AC-0127 New password accepted after clicking reset link
▼ EPIC-0004 Done Active Round — Shot Tracking MVP (v0.1) $3,601 projected
US-0015 Done High As a player, I want to start my round and confirm my starting hole, so that shot tracking begins correctly. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0047 Starting hole pre-filled from team assignment → TC-0014 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0048 round_state record created with status 'in_progress' → TC-0015 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0049 Player redirected to shot tracking screen
US-0016 Done High As a player, I want to see a map of the current hole with the pin location, so that I know where to aim. M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0050 Google Maps satellite view centered on current hole pin → TC-0055 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0051 Pin marker visible with distinct color
  • ○ AC-0052 Map occupies top ~35% of screen on mobile → TC-0061 Not Run
US-0017 Done High As a player, I want to select which team member is taking the current shot, so that we can track all four players from one phone. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0053 Player pills show all team members → TC-0020 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0054 Active player highlighted in green → TC-0021 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0055 Completed players (hole sunk) shown with strikethrough
  • ○ AC-0056 Tapping a pill switches active player
US-0018 Done High As a player, I want to select my club from a grouped dropdown, so that my club choice is recorded per shot. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0057 Dropdown shows active clubs grouped by category (Woods, Hybrids, Irons, Wedges, Putter) → TC-0022 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0058 Selected club name stored on shot record
US-0019 Done High As a player, I want to tap "Capture Shot" to record my GPS position, so that my shot location is tracked. M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0059 GPS position captured via browser Geolocation API → TC-0024 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0060 Shot record written through sync engine (offline-safe)
  • ○ AC-0061 Player pin appears on map at captured position
  • ○ AC-0062 GPS permission requested with clear explanation → TC-0025 Not Run
US-0020 Done High As a player, I want to choose the outcome of my shot (In-Play, OOB, Mulligan, Sunk), so that scoring is accurate. M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0063 Four outcome buttons displayed after shot capture
  • ○ AC-0064 In-Play records shot and moves to next player → TC-0029 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0065 OOB adds +1 penalty stroke and allows rehit → TC-0030 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0066 Mulligan discards shot (no stroke counted) → TC-0031 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0067 Sunk closes hole for that player → TC-0032 Not Run
US-0021 Planned High As a player, I want to edit a previous shot, so that I can correct mistakes. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $0.90
  • ○ AC-0068 Shot history visible for current hole
  • ○ AC-0069 Tapping a previous shot opens edit mode
  • ○ AC-0070 Modified shot updates in database and recalculates sequence
▼ EPIC-0005 Done Hole & Round Completion MVP (v0.1) $800.90 projected
US-0022 Done High As a player, I want the hole to complete automatically when all team members have sunk, so that we can see results. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0071 System detects when all active players have outcome 'sunk' → TC-0033 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0072 Best Ball Edge Function called automatically → TC-0034 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0073 Hole summary screen displayed
US-0023 Planned High As a player, I want to see a hole summary with everyone's strokes and the best ball highlighted, so that we know team performance. Medium 1.1 S · $0.90
  • ○ AC-0074 Each player's stroke count displayed → TC-0035 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0075 Best ball score highlighted with star indicator → TC-0036 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0076 Score relative to par shown (birdie, bogey, etc.) → TC-0037 Not Run
US-0024 Done High As a player, I want to advance to the next hole with wraparound (e.g., hole 10 start → 10→18→1→9), so that the shotgun format works correctly. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0077 "Next Hole" button advances correctly in sequence
  • ○ AC-0078 After hole 18, wraps to hole 1 → TC-0038 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0079 After completing 18 holes total, shows round complete summary → TC-0039 Not Run

  • ○ AC-0042 Welcome message with player's first name → TC-0016 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0043 Tournament name, venue, and countdown displayed → TC-0017 Not Run

US-0025 Done High As a player, I want a live team leaderboard showing rankings vs par, so that I can track my team's position. M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0080 Teams ranked by cumulative best-ball score vs par → TC-0040 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0081 Top 20 teams shown by default
  • ○ AC-0082 "Your Team ★" pinned with green highlight (even outside top 20) → TC-0041 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0083 "Thru" column shows holes completed per team → TC-0042 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0084 Scores update in real-time via Supabase Realtime → TC-0046 Not Run
US-0026 Done High As a spectator, I want a public leaderboard URL that works without login, so that I can follow the tournament. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0085 /live/cibc-granite-ridge-2026 loads without authentication → TC-0043 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0086 Same leaderboard UI without "Your Team" pin
  • ○ AC-0087 LIVE badge displayed in header → TC-0044 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0088 Sponsor logos visible below header
US-0027 Done High As a sponsor, I want my logo displayed on the leaderboard, so that I get visibility. S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0089 Sponsor logos fetched from sponsors table → TC-0045 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0090 Displayed in admin-set order below header
  • ○ AC-0091 Visible on both authenticated and public leaderboard

▶ EPIC-0001 In Progress Project Setup & Infrastructure 8
High US-0004

As a developer, I want the project deployed to Vercel, so that we have a production URL for players to register.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0011 Production deployment accessible via public URL
  • ○ AC-0012 Supabase env vars configured in Vercel
High US-0001

As a developer, I want the Next.js project initialized with Tailwind and shadcn/ui, so that I can build UI components rapidly.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0001 Next.js 14 App Router project runs with `npm run dev`
  • ○ AC-0002 Tailwind CSS classes render correctly
  • ○ AC-0003 shadcn/ui Button component renders without errors
High US-0002

As a developer, I want Supabase configured with browser and server clients, so that I can query the database from any context.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0004 Browser client connects to Supabase project
  • ○ AC-0005 Server client works in Server Components
  • ○ AC-0006 .env.local.example documents required env vars
High US-0003

As a developer, I want the database schema deployed with all tables, RLS policies, and indexes, so that the app has a complete data layer.

M 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0007 All 9 tables created (tournaments, holes, players, teams, clubs, round_state, shots, scores, sponsors)
  • ○ AC-0008 RLS policies enforce player vs admin separation
  • ○ AC-0009 Realtime enabled on scores table
  • ○ AC-0010 Unique constraints prevent duplicate entries
High US-0005

As a developer, I want a Google Maps wrapper component, so that I can display holes and player positions.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0013 Map renders with satellite view centered on pin coordinates
  • ○ AC-0014 Pin marker displays at hole location
  • ○ AC-0015 Player position marker updates on GPS capture
High US-0006

As a developer, I want clubs and Granite Ridge hole data seeded, so that the app has course data on first run.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0016 21 clubs seeded across 5 categories
  • ○ AC-0017 18 holes seeded with par values and approximate GPS
  • ○ AC-0018 Tournament record created for CIBC 2026 event
High US-0007

As a player, I want consistent FDgolf + AI/Run branding on every screen, so that the app feels professional.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0019 Full header shows "FDgolf | created by AI/Run™" with gradient icon
  • ○ AC-0020 Compact header shows condensed branding + hole info
  • ○ AC-0021 Dark green (#1a472a) consistent across all variants
High US-0008

As a developer, I want an offline sync engine that queues all writes to localStorage, so that shots are never lost.

M 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0022 Writes enqueue to localStorage regardless of connectivity
  • ○ AC-0023 Queue flushes automatically when online
  • ○ AC-0024 Failed writes retry up to 5 times
  • ○ AC-0025 Offline indicator shows pending count
  • ○ AC-0026 Online event triggers immediate flush

Medium US-0037

S 0/3 ACs ▾

  • ○ AC-0126 Reset email sent via Supabase Auth

As a player, I want to create an account with email and password, so that I can register for the tournament.

S 0/3 ACs ▾

  • ○ AC-0028 Supabase Auth account created on submit → TC-0002 Not Run

As a developer, I want auth middleware that protects routes and redirects unauthenticated users, so that player data is secure.

High US-0021

As a player, I want to edit a previous shot, so that I can correct mistakes.

M 0/3 ACs ▾

  • ○ AC-0069 Tapping a previous shot opens edit mode

As a player, I want to start my round and confirm my starting hole, so that shot tracking begins correctly.

S 0/3 ACs ▾

High US-0016

As a player, I want to see a map of the current hole with the pin location, so that I know where to aim.

M 0/3 ACs ▾

  • ○ AC-0052 Map occupies top ~35% of screen on mobile → TC-0061 Not Run
High US-0017

As a player, I want to select which team member is taking the current shot, so that we can track all four players from one phone.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0053 Player pills show all team members → TC-0020 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0054 Active player highlighted in green → TC-0021 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0055 Completed players (hole sunk) shown with strikethrough
  • ○ AC-0056 Tapping a pill switches active player
High US-0018

As a player, I want to select my club from a grouped dropdown, so that my club choice is recorded per shot.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0057 Dropdown shows active clubs grouped by category (Woods, Hybrids, Irons, Wedges, Putter) → TC-0022 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0058 Selected club name stored on shot record
High US-0019

As a player, I want to tap "Capture Shot" to record my GPS position, so that my shot location is tracked.

M 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0059 GPS position captured via browser Geolocation API → TC-0024 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0060 Shot record written through sync engine (offline-safe)
  • ○ AC-0061 Player pin appears on map at captured position
  • ○ AC-0062 GPS permission requested with clear explanation → TC-0025 Not Run
High US-0020

As a player, I want to choose the outcome of my shot (In-Play, OOB, Mulligan, Sunk), so that scoring is accurate.

M 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0063 Four outcome buttons displayed after shot capture
  • ○ AC-0064 In-Play records shot and moves to next player → TC-0029 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0065 OOB adds +1 penalty stroke and allows rehit → TC-0030 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0066 Mulligan discards shot (no stroke counted) → TC-0031 Not Run
  • ○ AC-0067 Sunk closes hole for that player → TC-0032 Not Run

AC-0010Unique constraints prevent duplicate entries

✓

AC-001621 clubs seeded across 5 categories
AC-001718 holes seeded with par values and approximate GPS

✓
US-0007As a player, I want consistent FDgolf + AI/Run branding on every screen, so that the app feels professional.

✓
US-0008As a developer, I want an offline sync engine that queues all writes to localStorage, so that shots are never lost.
AC-0022Writes enqueue to localStorage regardless of connectivity
AC-0023Queue flushes automatically when online
AC-0024Failed writes retry up to 5 times

Opens your browser's Save as PDF dialog

Settings

Changes are auto-saved to browser storage as you type. To make them permanent, click Copy config JSON and paste the result into plan-visualizer.config.json at your project root.

GitHub Issues Sync

Enabled
Sync bugs Sync stories
Token (GITHUB_TOKEN env var)
✗ Not set — only needed if you want to sync bugs/stories to GitHub Issues. Set it with: export GITHUB_TOKEN=<your-token> in your shell before running node tools/generate-plan.js
Last sync
—

Memory

Configures how stale memory files are archived. See docs/memory/ and tools/memory.js.

Default: 90 days; auto-archive off. Edit plan-visualizer.config.json → memory block to persist.
